headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Dow, Lowers Price Target to $37
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   maintains Dow (NYSE:DOW) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $39 to $37.

raw.headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Dow, Lowers Price Target to $37

headline: Dow to participate at the 2026 Wells Fargo 16th Annual Industrials & Materials Conference
summary: Dow Inc. (NYSE: DOW) will participate in a fireside chat during the 2026 Wells Fargo 16th Annual Industrials & Materials Conference on Tuesday, June 9 at 9:45 a.m. ET.
